---
title: "This picture broke my brain"
author: "3Blue1Brown"
date: "2026-03-24"
date-added: "2026-03-24"
categories: [mathematics, visualization, video]
status: to-watch
url: "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ldxFjLJ3rVY&feature=youtu.be"
---

3Blue1Brown video exploring a mind-bending mathematical picture.

[Watch →](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ldxFjLJ3rVY&feature=youtu.be)
